author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو الحسن علي بن إسماعيل بن إسحاق بن سالم بن إسماعيل بن عبد الله بن موسى بن أبي بردة بن أبي موسى الأشعري
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Founding figure of the Asha'ari school of theology, influential in Sunni Islamic thought.
author_identification.methodological_stance: Rationalist approach within the framework of Sunni theology, emphasizing the use of reason to defend Islamic doctrine.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Foundational text in Asha'ari theology, articulating core principles of Sunni belief.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the earliest systematic expositions of Sunni theology, influential in shaping Islamic intellectual history.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. فوقية حسين محمود is a recognized scholar in Islamic studies, known for her contributions to the study of classical Islamic texts.
